text: SURPRISE AND QUICK ACTION.
Three pronged, attacking at first light.
First prong. BRIDGEHEAD AT REINE
ASSAULT inland and occupy neck of land joining
peninsula with main portion of Island.
DESTROY all COMMUNICATIONS, telephone wires etc
and occupy POST OFFICE
Spread out with bridgehead and occupy town
SECOND PRONG At Summ to cut line of communications at
EMO POINT
(from ANDO to main land)
THIRD PRONG To take wireless station and lighthouse
Initial stages Cut off and destroy power station between
PANDAR - ANDO - REINE this plant,
any further use of oil refineries etc.
AT WIRELESS STATION. LIGHTHOUSE completely Surprised
GERMANS AT REINE not aware SLIGHT resistance
at Summ. AGES OF ENEMY 16 to 45.
Quislings FRIGHTENED. ONE ESCAPED CAPTURED
CHEST HIGH IN FREEZING WATER
POPULATION TALK was for Germans the Americans
outgrea at BRITISH. IRISH brod.
Description of Norwegian
